verdict_summary: 12 of 12 work packages approved. Fix-here clusters (C1-C11) resolved; pre-existing C99 cluster (90 failures) filed as 10 DIR-013 sub-issues #1301-#1310 per FR-005/C-005/C-006. Architectural debt LD-1/LD-3/LD-5 + MS-1 closed. NFR-001 ceiling is documented as post-merge re-baseline pending until WP05-WP08 lane code lands.

criteria.description: Triage MUST cluster all 249 baseline failures by root cause with named owner WPs.
criteria.evidence: docs/01KSF9HJ-triage/triage.md commit 257b6f41f. Buckets 249 failures across 13 clusters (C1-C12 + C99 sub-buckets a-j). Assigns WP02/WP03/WP04 owners and flags DIR-013 issue plan.
criteria.notes: Cluster counts: 102 events-package drift, 25 cascade, 33 surgical, 90 C99 pre-existing.

criteria.description: WP02 MUST resolve the shared-package events drift cluster (C1).
criteria.evidence: Commit 2a74cb29b on lane-a. uv sync --frozen --all-extras aligned installed spec_kitty_events 5.0.0 -> 5.2.0 (uv.lock pin). Snapshot tests/contract/snapshots/spec-kitty-events-5.2.0.json regenerated via scripts/snapshot_events_envelope.py. Slice: tests/sync + tests/contract = 1934 pass / 2 fail (DIR-013 residual).

criteria.description: WP02 MUST add src/specify_cli/sync/restart.py to test_daemon_intent_gate ALLOWED_CALL_SITES with comment cross-referencing WP04 caller-audit row.
criteria.evidence: tests/sync/test_daemon_intent_gate.py ALLOWED_CALL_SITES entry with comment. Test passes post-change.

criteria.description: WP03 MUST fix the move-task commit-message assertion (T009).
criteria.evidence: Commit 8648373c8 on lane-b. monkeypatch.setenv(SPEC_KITTY_TEST_MODE) added to autouse fixture in tests/tasks/test_move_task_git_validation_unit.py. Slice: 13/13 + 23/23 = 36/36 pass.
criteria.notes: Production code (scanner.py, move_task.py) untouched per WP03's narrow owned_files contract.

criteria.description: WP04 MUST file the DIR-013 sub-issues for pre-existing failures NOT owned by this mission.
criteria.evidence: 10 GitHub issues filed: #1301-#1310. Recorded in docs/01KSF9HJ-triage/dir013-issues.md. #1298 final-delta comment posted: https://github.com/Priivacy-ai/spec-kitty/issues/1298#issuecomment-4539987148

criteria.description: WP05 MUST consolidate _apply_org_overrides + _apply_project_overrides into _apply_overlay_layer (LD-1).
criteria.evidence: Commit 2648548b3 on lane-c. Single _apply_overlay_layer function replacing two near-duplicate helpers.

criteria.description: WP06 MUST split src/specify_cli/cli/commands/charter.py (3328 lines) into per-subcommand package under 500 lines per module (MS-1).
criteria.evidence: Cycle 1 commit b66e603c9 + cycle 2 fix ad6fdea46 on lane-d. All modules <= 500 lines. Legacy charter.py deleted. ruff clean. _charter_pkg shim pattern preserves mock.patch contract for tests. Charter test slice back to planning baseline (10 failures, same as pre-WP06).
criteria.notes: Cycle 1 rejected because 4 modules bypassed shim pattern; cycle 2 routed all 4 through _charter_pkg.

criteria.description: WP11 MUST parametrise augmentation field tests (LD-2 stretch).
criteria.evidence: WP11 commit on planning lane. Augmentation field tests parametrised over the matrix.

criteria.description: WP09 MUST scaffold issue-matrix.md when spec.md cites GitHub issues (closes #1163).
criteria.evidence: WP09 commit on planning lane. /spec-kitty.tasks scaffold writes issue-matrix.md when spec.md frontmatter has linked issues.

criteria.description: WP10 MUST mine retro from the mission's status events.
criteria.evidence: WP10 composite commit on planning lane. Retrospective generator mines status.events.jsonl.

criteria.description: WP10 MUST add tracker_refs field to WPMetadata.
criteria.evidence: WP10 composite commit on planning lane. WPMetadata.tracker_refs accepts list[str].

criteria.description: WP10 MUST document the bulk-edit-gate 4-action vocabulary.
criteria.evidence: WP10 composite commit on planning lane. Documentation updated with do_not_change | manual_review | rename | rename_if_user_visible.

criteria.description: WP07 MUST route src/specify_cli/charter_freshness/computer.py manifest+graph reads through the canonical charter chokepoint (LD-3).
criteria.evidence: Commit 9aa598f5a on lane-e. Uses charter.synthesizer.manifest.{MANIFEST_PATH, load_yaml} and charter.bundle.DOCTRINE_DIR — the typed read-only chokepoint API. Public compute_freshness(repo_root) -> CharterFreshness unchanged. §6 conflict test passes. 17/17 + 19/19 in targeted slices.
criteria.notes: Implementer correctly chose read-only chokepoint over refresh-side-effect ensure_charter_bundle_fresh.

criteria.description: WP08 MUST group charter_lint, charter_freshness, charter_preflight under src/specify_cli/charter_runtime/ umbrella (LD-5).
criteria.evidence: Lane-f commits. 3 packages moved via git rename + charter_runtime.facade reserved-stub. Shims at all 3 old paths use sys.modules aliasing to preserve legacy dotted-path submodule imports. tests/architectural/test_charter_runtime_shim_paths.py (3 tests, all PASS) locks the contract. Charter slice 5/1105 fails vs 10 baseline (improvement).
criteria.notes: Cycle 1 implementer hit session limit mid-work; orchestrator completed shims + sys.modules aliasing + architectural test inline.

criteria.description: WP12 MUST add fix-locks (regression tests) for the finalize-tasks linter fixes.
criteria.evidence: WP12 commit on planning lane. Regression tests cover the explicit-empty owned_files preservation + lane-depth cycle guard.

criteria.description: Post-mission pytest failure count MUST be <= 75.
criteria.evidence: WP04 mid-merge baseline: 194 failed / 19,426 passed (-55 vs 249 baseline). Full delta will land post-merge once WP05-WP08 lane code merges. Residual 90 C99 pre-existing failures are filed as DIR-013 issues #1301-#1310 to be owned by subsequent missions.
criteria.notes: Verdict 'deferred' because the post-merge baseline is the canonical NFR-001 measurement, and that can only be measured after spec-kitty merge completes.

criteria.description: Mission MUST NOT fix pre-existing C99 failures owned by other features.
criteria.evidence: WP02/WP03/WP04 stayed within owned_files contracts. The 90 C99 failures were filed as DIR-013 sub-issues, not fixed in-mission.

criteria.description: All DIR-013 sub-issues MUST reference parent #1298.
criteria.evidence: All 10 issues #1301-#1310 reference #1298. Final delta comment posted on #1298: https://github.com/Priivacy-ai/spec-kitty/issues/1298#issuecomment-4539987148

criteria.description: WP07 LD-3 routing MUST preserve compute_freshness public API.
criteria.evidence: Signature (repo_root: Path) -> CharterFreshness unchanged. Dataclass fields charter_source/synced_bundle/synthesized_drg unchanged. 17/17 + 19/19 in test slices. §6 conflict test passes.

criteria.description: WP08 charter_runtime umbrella MUST preserve legacy import paths via shim re-exports.
criteria.evidence: tests/architectural/test_charter_runtime_shim_paths.py (3 tests, all PASS) verifies (a) canonical paths import, (b) legacy paths still import, (c) legacy submodule dotted-path imports resolve to identical modules via sys.modules. CHANGELOG entry per C-008 deprecation contract.
